svg.title: Replication Mesh Explorer
svg.desc: Replication Mesh Explorer with 5 groups, 10 nodes, and 17 edges.

g.data-cfx-scenarios: [{"id":"client-request-europe","label":"Europe request","description":"Nominal client request from Frankfurt through London to New York.","color":"#2563EB","stepCount":5,"metadata":{"origin.region":"EMEA","request.type":"client"},"steps":[{"index":0,"kind":"Node","id":"fra-dc1","label":"Origin"},{"index":1,"kind":"Edge","id":"fra-lon","label":"Route","metadata":{"transport":"WAN"}},{"index":2,"kind":"Node","id":"lon-dc2","label":"Policy"},{"index":3,"kind":"Edge","id":"lon-nyc","label":"Directory","metadata":{"transport":"Directory replication"}},{"index":4,"kind":"Node","id":"nyc-dc1","label":"Lookup"}]},{"id":"apac-failover","label":"APAC failover","description":"Critical APAC failover path through Singapore and San Francisco.","color":"#EF4444","stepCount":5,"metadata":{"origin.region":"APAC","request.type":"failover"},"steps":[{"index":0,"kind":"Node","id":"fra-dc2","label":"Origin"},{"index":1,"kind":"Edge","id":"fra-sin","label":"Degraded","metadata":{"risk":"critical"}},{"index":2,"kind":"Node","id":"sin-dc1","label":"Fallback"},{"index":3,"kind":"Edge","id":"sin-sfo","label":"Recovery","metadata":{"risk":"recovery"}},{"index":4,"kind":"Node","id":"sfo-dc2","label":"Target"}]}]

g.text: Replication paths, lag, queues, route ports, lanes, and icon nodes.
